_comment: Labeled retrieval-quality set for MrFoX-MeM's own repo. A retrieved node counts as relevant if any 'relevant' substring appears (case-insensitively) in its label or path. Used by scripts/eval.py to compute hit@k / recall@k / MRR and per-stage ablations. Keep queries phrased as a user/agent would ask, NOT as the target filename.

queries.q: how does hybrid search combine vector similarity with keyword ranking
reciprocal rank fusion of the two result lists
personalized pagerank ranking over the code graph
cross encoder reranker for the top candidates
where are secrets redacted so they are never stored
assemble a token bounded context block within a budget
sqlite schema content addressed blob storage
extract symbols from multiple languages with tree sitter
which tools does the MCP server expose to the agent
session start hook injects project context into claude code
local embeddings with a hashing fallback backend
fence injected memory as untrusted data against prompt injection
single atomic transaction for the whole ingest
benchmark how many tokens the slice saves versus whole files
count tokens with tiktoken and a chars per token fallback
validate the ingest path and reject symlink escapes
